text: 安装过程中弹出‘Windows protected your PC’黄色横幅，绕过方法全试过仍阻止运行
label: 安装失败

text: Rsync cron job ran with --delete flag against wrong target → synced empty folder to /home/user/docs → 22GB personal docs wiped.
label: 数据丢失

text: 客户用华为鸿蒙OS 4.2升级后，我们的SDK初始化直接返回-1，文档里只写了支持Android 8.0+，鸿蒙算不算兼容？
label: 兼容性问题

text: VMware虚拟机（Win7 x64）安装时报‘This application requires .NET Framework 4.8 or higher’，但已确认安装成功
label: 安装失败

text: 更新过程中断电，再开机后软件打不开，报错‘updater.lock file corrupted’
label: 更新失败

text: 公司内网环境下更新总提示‘证书不可信’，能帮忙看看是代理配置问题吗？
label: 更新失败

text: 老款Surface Pro 4（i5-6300U + Intel HD Graphics 520）启动软件时黑屏卡死，换GTX1050显卡的台式机能正常，显卡驱动兼容性有测试覆盖吗？
label: 兼容性问题

text: 批量导入Excel时，进度条停在67%长达2分钟，鼠标可移动但所有按钮灰掉无法取消。
label: 性能卡顿

text: 阿里云ECS（CentOS 7.9）执行curl -sSL https://xxx/install.sh | bash 报错：command not found: jq
label: 安装失败

text: GitLab CI pipeline fails with ‘permission denied (publickey)’ when pushing to protected branch. Key is added and works elsewhere.
label: 权限问题

text: No multi-currency support in expense reports — all amounts auto-convert to USD, breaks local accounting.
label: 功能缺失

text: After updating macOS to Sequoia, all my Notes app entries from March disappeared — no backup visible. Is this data loss?
label: 数据丢失

text: 安装向导第3步点击‘下一步’直接崩溃，事件查看器里看到Faulting module name: msvcr120.dll
label: 安装失败

text: 每次点‘立即更新’都弹出‘网络连接异常’，但网页和微信都能正常用……
label: 更新失败

text: 安装包MD5校验失败，重新下载三次都一样，官网链接确定没被劫持
label: 安装失败

text: Docker环境下运行install.sh提示‘/bin/bash^M: bad interpreter’，查了是换行符问题
label: 安装失败

text: Ravel’s 'Boléro' repeats same melody 18 times over unchanging snare drum ostinato—builds intensity via orchestration, not microservice scaling.
label: OOD

text: 客户数据库连接字符串含@符号未转义，导致初始化阶段JVM crash with SIGSEGV
label: 崩溃闪退

text: Why no ‘find and replace across all documents’? Only works per-file — totally inefficient.
label: 功能缺失

text: 客户现场部署后，服务每运行2小时左右就莫名退出，日志末尾是空行
label: 崩溃闪退

text: 安卓平板上用网页版，滑动列表卡顿严重，手指一抬就断触，像在拖泥带水。
label: 性能卡顿

text: Scottish Fold cats’ folded ears stem from autosomal dominant gene mutation affecting cartilage—not a frontend component collapse.
label: OOD

text: 我的账号为什么不能编辑项目文档？提示‘Access denied’
label: 权限问题
